# Agentic SDLC Ops

Agentic SDLC is a governance lifecycle for issue-first, agent-driven software delivery.

Primary project name: Agentic SDLC Ops
Canonical site: https://agenticsdlc.github.io/agentic-sdlc-ops/
Source repository: https://github.com/AgenticSDLC/agentic-sdlc-ops
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/agentic-sdlc-ops

## What this project is

- A portable lifecycle and workflow kit for governable agent-driven delivery
- A repository-first model with visible plans, lifecycle labels, and verification gates
- A CLI that scaffolds and checks issue-first operating contracts

## What this project is not

- Not a centralized platform that replaces CI or deployment tooling
- Not a hidden autonomous executor with opaque decisions
- Not tied to a single cloud or runtime stack

## Start here

- Guidebook: https://agenticsdlc.github.io/agentic-sdlc-ops/
- What is Agentic SDLC: https://agenticsdlc.github.io/agentic-sdlc-ops/agentic-sdlc.html
- Repository README: https://github.com/AgenticSDLC/agentic-sdlc-ops/blob/main/README.md
- Getting started (web-app): https://github.com/AgenticSDLC/agentic-sdlc-ops/blob/main/docs/getting-started-web-app.md

## Core terms

- Agentic SDLC
- Agentic SDLC Ops
- issue-first agent-driven software delivery
- governance for agentic delivery
